response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including geospatial data platforms (GISCollective). However, her primary expertise leans heavily toward web/mobile development (TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, React) and languages like Dlang, with limited recent experience in C++ or Rust. While her geospatial project (GISCollective) is relevant, her lack of direct experience with routing data pipelines, high-performance geospatial processing, or distributed systems in the required languages raises concerns about her immediate fit for this role.
strengths: Experience with geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) and open-source contributions
Strong background in software craftsmanship, testing, and CI/CD practices
Demonstrated ability to learn new technologies and adapt to diverse projects
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ or Rust (primary languages for this role)
Most recent work focuses on web/mobile stacks (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than high-performance systems
No explicit experience with routing data pipelines, traffic signal integration, or distributed geospatial systems
